title: Research Associate I
description: Join Moderna's research team to support groundbreaking biotechnology research and development efforts.
responsibilities: Conduct laboratory experiments and research procedures
Maintain detailed research documentation and data integrity
Prepare samples and reagents for research protocols
Assist senior researchers with project execution
Troubleshoot experimental issues and optimize procedures
Support regulatory submissions and research compliance

requirements.education: High school diploma or equivalent; relevant degree or certification strongly preferred

benefits: Flexible time off and work arrangements
